source_old_req: The Consumer.impl implementation must assume that the shared_data_initialized Boolean variable is true and that the shared data space is non-empty before any read operation. The Consumer.impl implementation must guarantee that the execution time of its logical computation does not exceed 3 ms each time it is activated, ensuring that the underlying consumer C code does not cause resource starvation due to infinite loops under same-priority scheduling.
natural_requirement: The Consumer component shall execute according to the scheduling and timing constraints defined for Consumer.impl. The implementation shall use the Periodic dispatch protocol, execute with a period of 1000 ms, meet a deadline of 1000 ms, complete compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms, and run at priority 101.

requirement_items.text: The Consumer.impl implementation shall execute using the Periodic dispatch protocol.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Periodic.

requirement_items.text: The Consumer.impl implementation shall execute with a period of 1000 ms.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Period as 1000 ms.

requirement_items.text: The Consumer.impl implementation shall complete its compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Compute_Execution_Time as 0 ms .. 3 ms.

requirement_items.text: The Consumer.impl implementation shall meet a deadline of 1000 ms.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Deadline as 1000 ms.

requirement_items.text: The Consumer.impl implementation shall run at priority 101.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Priority as 101.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Periodic. The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Period as 1000 ms. The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Compute_Execution_Time as 0 ms .. 3 ms. The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Deadline as 1000 ms. The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Priority as 101. The Consumer.impl implementation shall assign Stack_Size as 5000 Bytes.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The Consumer.impl implementation shall execute using the Periodic dispatch protocol. The Consumer.impl implementation shall execute with a period of 1000 ms. The Consumer.impl implementation shall complete its compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms. The Consumer.impl implementation shall meet a deadline of 1000 ms. The Consumer.impl implementation shall run at priority 101.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
